message.content:
@startuml
title sample

actor "user" as user1
actor "user" as user2
rectangle "application" as app1
rectangle "application" as app2
database "DB" as db1
database "DB" as db2

user1 --> app1 : request
app1 --> db1 : retrieve by id
db1 --> app1 : 
app1 --> user1 : response

user2 --> app2 : 
app2 --> db2 : 
db2 --> app2 : 
app2 --> user2 : 

@enduml
